notes: Applied rename_room (Bedroom2 -> KidsRoom) and resize_room ops via modify.mjs, then patched the two dangling identifier references the documented modify.mjs rename_room limitation leaves behind: 'right-of Bedroom2' on Bath2 and 'connect Hall.bottom to Bedroom2.top'. KidsRoom kept its existing 10x12 footprint (resize was a no-op at the requested size). MasterBedroom was 12x12 (square), so 'long edge' was ambiguous; grew the width by 2 ft to 14x12, which keeps the right-of chain intact (MasterBath shifts from x=28 to x=30) and preserves the existing Hall<->MasterBedroom and MasterBedroom<->MasterBath door percentages. validate.mjs returns valid=true with zero warnings/errors; analyze.mjs confirms KidsRoom (10x12) and MasterBedroom (14x12), and Bedroom2 is no longer present in rooms/adjacency/connections. Net area now 908 sqft (was 884).
